title: rubia tatarica
intro: Rubia tatarica, also known as Tatarian rhubarb or tatarin, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthraquinone glycosides, which have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubia tatarica include its ability to promote digestion, relieve constipation, and reduce inflammation in the body. Rubia tatarica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root for medicinal use, with the dried root being the most commonly used form for its medicinal properties.
